---
title: "Florence Freeman"
---

## Florence Freeman

**Dates:** (b.1854/5)

### Description

daughter of E. A. Freeman, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1891-3)

### Biography

Either she, or possibly her sister Margaret, took part in the Spider competitions under the name ‘Pisa’. Unmarried in 1905, when she and her sister Helen were awarded a civil list pension in consideration of their father’s historical works. [<i>The Times</i> 22 June 1905]

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 4th [1893?]
- Letter from April 19th 1875
- Letter from Jany 27th 1875
- Letter from May 18th 1874
- Letter from May 18th 1874
- Letter from May 13th 1874
- Letter from May 10th [1874]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
